---
title: "Motor Claims Partner Network — Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - assets/allianz.scss
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: house
        href: index.qmd
server: shiny
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
#| context: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(gt)
library(leaflet)
library(shiny)
library(bslib)

source("R/utils_viz.R")
source("R/utils_kpi.R")
source("R/utils_models.R")

claims   <- readRDS("data/claims.rds")
partners <- readRDS("data/partners.rds")

# Pre-compute KPIs
kpis        <- compute_kpis(claims, partners)
kpis_cost   <- cost_benchmark(kpis)
speed_df    <- speed_benchmark(claims, partners)
kpis_qual   <- quality_index(kpis_cost)
kpis_full   <- composite_score(kpis_qual, speed_df)

# Swiss region centroids (approximate lat/lng)
region_coords <- tribble(
  ~region,    ~lat,   ~lng,
  "Zürich",   47.38,  8.54,
  "Bern",     46.95,  7.45,
  "Basel",    47.56,  7.59,
  "Luzern",   47.05,  8.30,
  "St.Gallen",47.42,  9.38,
  "Genf",     46.20,  6.15,
  "Lausanne", 46.52,  6.63,
  "Tessin",   46.10,  8.96
)

# O/E ratios — Gamma GLM with log-link (consistent with Stage 2 analysis).
# Using lm(log(cost)) and back-transforming with exp() would systematically
# under-predict costs due to Jensen's inequality (exp(E[log Y]) < E[Y]).
claims_s <- claims |>
  filter(steering_flag == 1L, !is.na(partner_id))

m_combined <- glm(
  repair_cost ~ claim_type + vehicle_class + vehicle_age + severity_score + region,
  data   = claims_s,
  family = Gamma(link = "log")
)
claims_s <- claims_s |>
  mutate(expected_cost = predict(m_combined, newdata = claims_s, type = "response"))

oe_df <- claims_s |>
  group_by(partner_id) |>
  summarise(
    n_claims = n(),
    observed = sum(repair_cost),
    expected = sum(expected_cost),
    oe_ratio = observed / expected,
    .groups  = "drop"
  ) |>
  left_join(partners |> select(partner_id, name, type, region), by = "partner_id")

# Partner type options
partner_types_opts  <- c("All", levels(partners$type))
claim_types_opts    <- c("All", "glass", "body", "engine", "total_loss")
```

# Network Overview {orientation="columns"}

## Column {width="25%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Claims"
list(
  icon  = "file-earmark-text",
  color = "primary",
  value = scales::comma(nrow(claims))
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Network Partners"
list(
  icon  = "building",
  color = "info",
  value = nrow(partners)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Steering Rate"
list(
  icon  = "arrow-right-circle",
  color = "secondary",
  value = paste0(round(mean(claims$steering_flag) * 100, 1), "%")
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Avg. Cost Saving"
list(
  icon  = "piggy-bank",
  color = "success",
  value = paste0(
    "CHF ",
    scales::comma(round(
      mean(claims$repair_cost[claims$steering_flag == 0]) -
        mean(claims$repair_cost[claims$steering_flag == 1])
    ))
  )
)
```

## Column {width="75%"}

### Row {height="60%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Partner Locations — Claim Volume"
leafletOutput("map_partners", height = "100%")
```

### Row {height="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Claims by Type"
plotlyOutput("donut_claim_type", height = "100%")
```

```{r}
#| title: "Partner Types"
plotlyOutput("donut_partner_type", height = "100%")
```

# Partner Scorecard {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height="20%"}

::: {.card}
```{r}
selectInput("sc_region",   "Region",       choices = c("All", unique(partners$region)))
selectInput("sc_ptype",    "Partner Type", choices = partner_types_opts)
selectInput("sc_ctype",    "Claim Type",   choices = claim_types_opts)
```
:::

## Row {height="80%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Funnel Plot: O/E Ratio vs. Volume"
plotlyOutput("funnel_plot", height = "100%")
```

```{r}
#| title: "Filtered Partner Table"
gt_output("league_table")
```

# Steering Effect {orientation="columns"}

## Column {width="40%"}

```{r}
#| title: "CATE by Claim Type"
plotlyOutput("cate_chart", height = "100%")
```

## Column {width="60%"}

```{r}
selectInput("se_region", "Filter by Region",
            choices = c("All", unique(claims$region)))
```

```{r}
#| title: "Steering Rate vs. Cost Saving by Region"
plotlyOutput("region_effect", height = "100%")
```

# Partner Lookup {orientation="rows"}

## Row {height="30%"}

::: {.card title="Claim Profile"}
```{r}
fluidRow(
  column(3, selectInput("lu_claim_type",  "Claim Type",
                        choices = c("glass","body","engine","total_loss"))),
  column(3, selectInput("lu_veh_class",   "Vehicle Class",
                        choices = c("economy","mid","premium"))),
  column(3, sliderInput("lu_veh_age",     "Vehicle Age (years)",
                        min = 0, max = 20, value = 5, step = 1)),
  column(3, sliderInput("lu_severity",    "Severity Score",
                        min = 0, max = 1, value = 0.5, step = 0.05))
)
fluidRow(
  column(3, selectInput("lu_region",      "Region",
                        choices = unique(partners$region))),
  column(3, actionButton("lu_run",        "Find Partners",
                          class = "btn-primary", style = "margin-top: 25px"))
)
```
:::

## Row {height="70%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Recommended Partners"
gt_output("partner_recs")
```

```{r}
#| context: server

# ── Page 1: Map ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
output$map_partners <- renderLeaflet({
  map_data <- partners |>
    count(region) |>
    left_join(region_coords, by = "region") |>
    left_join(
      claims |> filter(steering_flag == 1) |>
        count(region, name = "n_claims"),
      by = "region"
    )

  leaflet(map_data) |>
    addTiles() |>
    setView(lng = 8.2, lat = 46.8, zoom = 7) |>
    addCircleMarkers(
      lng      = ~lng, lat = ~lat,
      radius   = ~sqrt(n_claims) / 3,
      color    = "#003781",
      fillColor = "#0066CC",
      fillOpacity = 0.7,
      stroke   = TRUE, weight = 1.5,
      popup    = ~paste0(
        "<b>", region, "</b><br>",
        "Partners: ", n, "<br>",
        "Steered claims: ", scales::comma(n_claims)
      )
    ) |>
    addLegend("bottomright",
              colors = c("#003781"),
              labels = c("Region (size = claim volume)"),
              title  = "Allianz Suisse Network")
})

output$donut_claim_type <- renderPlotly({
  claims |>
    count(claim_type) |>
    plot_ly(
      labels  = ~claim_type, values = ~n,
      type    = "pie", hole = 0.55,
      marker  = list(colors = c("#003781","#0066CC","#00A9CE","#FF6600")),
      textinfo = "label+percent"
    ) |>
    layout(showlegend = FALSE,
           paper_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB", plot_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB",
           margin = list(t = 10, b = 10))
})

output$donut_partner_type <- renderPlotly({
  partners |>
    count(type) |>
    plot_ly(
      labels  = ~type, values = ~n,
      type    = "pie", hole = 0.55,
      marker  = list(colors = c("#003781","#0066CC","#00A9CE","#66B5E8","#FF6600")),
      textinfo = "label+percent"
    ) |>
    layout(showlegend = FALSE,
           paper_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB", plot_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB",
           margin = list(t = 10, b = 10))
})

# ── Page 2: Scorecard ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
filtered_oe <- reactive({
  d <- oe_df
  if (input$sc_region != "All") d <- filter(d, region == input$sc_region)
  if (input$sc_ptype  != "All") d <- filter(d, type   == input$sc_ptype)
  d
})

filtered_kpis <- reactive({
  d <- kpis_full
  if (input$sc_region != "All") d <- filter(d, region == input$sc_region)
  if (input$sc_ptype  != "All") d <- filter(d, type   == input$sc_ptype)
  if (input$sc_ctype  != "All") {
    vol_by_type <- claims |>
      filter(claim_type == input$sc_ctype, steering_flag == 1, !is.na(partner_id)) |>
      count(partner_id)
    d <- semi_join(d, vol_by_type, by = "partner_id")
  }
  d
})

output$funnel_plot <- renderPlotly({
  d <- filtered_oe()
  if (nrow(d) < 2) return(plotly_empty())

  p <- ggplot(d, aes(x = n_claims, y = oe_ratio,
                      text = paste0(name, "<br>O/E: ", round(oe_ratio, 3),
                                    "<br>Volume: ", n_claims))) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", colour = "#6B7280") +
    geom_point(aes(colour = oe_ratio > 1.1 | oe_ratio < 0.9),
               size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
    scale_colour_manual(
      values = c(`FALSE` = "#0066CC", `TRUE` = "#FF6600"),
      labels = c("Within range", "Outlier"), name = NULL
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(trans = "log10") +
    labs(x = "Claim Volume (log)", y = "O/E Ratio") +
    theme_allianz()

  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |>
    layout(paper_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB", plot_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB")
})

output$league_table <- render_gt({
  d <- filtered_kpis()
  if (nrow(d) == 0) return(gt(tibble(Message = "No partners match filters")))

  d |>
    arrange(desc(composite)) |>
    slice_head(n = 15) |>
    select(name, type, region, n_claims, avg_cost, composite, avg_csat) |>
    gt() |>
    fmt_number(columns = avg_cost, decimals = 0, sep_mark = ",") |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(composite, avg_csat), decimals = 1) |>
    data_color(columns = composite, palette = c("#FF6600","#66B5E8","#003781")) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#003781"),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = list(cell_text(color = "white", weight = "bold")),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    tab_options(table.font.size = px(12))
})

# ── Page 3: Steering Effect ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
output$cate_chart <- renderPlotly({
  # Load CATE estimates from Stage 3 analysis if available.
  # Fallback: compute lightweight AIPW point estimates (no bootstrap).
  # This avoids hard-coding ground truth values as if they were model outputs.
  cate_data <- if (file.exists("data/cate_results.rds")) {
    readRDS("data/cate_results.rds") |>
      select(claim_type, estimated = cate_pct)
  } else {
    ps_res   <- fit_propensity(claims)
    cate_live <- cate_by_segment(ps_res$data)
    cate_live |> select(claim_type, estimated = cate_pct)
  }

  p <- ggplot(cate_data, aes(x = claim_type, y = estimated,
                              text = paste0(claim_type, ": ", round(estimated, 1), "%"))) +
    geom_col(aes(fill = estimated < 0), width = 0.65, alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "#6B7280") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(`TRUE`="#00A9CE",`FALSE`="#FF6600"), guide="none") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale=1)) +
    labs(x = "Claim Type", y = "Cost Change (%)") +
    theme_allianz()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |>
    layout(paper_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB", plot_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB")
})

output$region_effect <- renderPlotly({
  d <- claims
  if (input$se_region != "All") d <- filter(d, region == input$se_region)

  region_summary <- d |>
    group_by(region) |>
    summarise(
      pct_steered = mean(steering_flag),
      cost_steered    = mean(repair_cost[steering_flag==1], na.rm=T),
      cost_not_steered = mean(repair_cost[steering_flag==0], na.rm=T),
      cost_saving     = cost_not_steered - cost_steered,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  p <- ggplot(region_summary, aes(x = pct_steered, y = cost_saving,
                                    size = pct_steered,
                                    text = paste0(region, "<br>Steered: ",
                                                  scales::percent(pct_steered,1),
                                                  "<br>Saving: CHF",
                                                  scales::comma(round(cost_saving))))) +
    geom_point(aes(colour = cost_saving), alpha = 0.8, stroke = 0) +
    ggrepel::geom_label_repel(aes(label = region), size = 2.5, fill = "white",
                               colour = "#003781", max.overlaps = 8) +
    scale_colour_gradient(low = "#66B5E8", high = "#003781", guide = "none") +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(4, 12), guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(prefix = "CHF ", big.mark = ",")) +
    labs(x = "Steering Rate", y = "Avg. Cost Saving (CHF)") +
    theme_allianz()
  ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") |>
    layout(paper_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB", plot_bgcolor = "#F4F7FB")
})

# ── Page 4: Partner Lookup ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
recs <- eventReactive(input$lu_run, {
  type_map <- list(
    glass = "Glaspartner", body = "Werkstatt",
    engine = "Werkstatt", total_loss = "Gutachter"
  )
  ptype <- type_map[[input$lu_claim_type]]

  eligible <- kpis_full |>
    filter(type == ptype) |>
    drop_na(composite) |>
    arrange(desc(composite))

  if (nrow(eligible) == 0) return(tibble(Message = "No partners available"))

  # Score by composite + region preference + claim-type volume
  claim_vol <- claims |>
    filter(steering_flag == 1, claim_type == input$lu_claim_type,
           !is.na(partner_id)) |>
    count(partner_id, name = "type_volume")

  eligible |>
    left_join(claim_vol, by = "partner_id") |>
    mutate(
      type_volume    = replace_na(type_volume, 0),
      region_match   = region == input$lu_region,
      score = 0.50 * scale(composite)[,1] +
               0.30 * scale(type_volume)[,1] +
               0.20 * region_match
    ) |>
    arrange(desc(score)) |>
    slice_head(n = 5) |>
    select(
      `Partner`           = name,
      `Type`              = type,
      `Region`            = region,
      `Composite Score`   = composite,
      `Avg. Cost (CHF)`   = avg_cost,
      `Avg. Duration (d)` = avg_duration,
      `CSAT`              = avg_csat,
      `Volume (type)`     = type_volume
    )
}, ignoreNULL = FALSE)

output$partner_recs <- render_gt({
  d <- recs()
  if ("Message" %in% names(d)) return(gt(d))

  d |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title    = "Recommended Partners",
      subtitle = paste0(
        str_to_title(input$lu_claim_type), " · ",
        str_to_title(input$lu_veh_class), " · ",
        "Severity ", input$lu_severity, " · ",
        input$lu_region
      )
    ) |>
    fmt_number(columns = `Avg. Cost (CHF)`, decimals = 0, sep_mark = ",") |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(`Composite Score`, `Avg. Duration (d)`, CSAT), decimals = 1) |>
    data_color(columns = `Composite Score`,
               palette = c("#FF6600","#66B5E8","#003781")) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#003781"),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = list(cell_text(color = "white", weight = "bold")),
      locations = cells_column_labels()
    ) |>
    tab_options(table.font.size = px(13))
})
```
